code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{projects}from'../components/data/data';import{FaGithub}from'react-icons/fa';import{MdPreview}from'react-icons/md';import'../components/Style/work.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Work=()=>{const[hoveredProject,setHoveredProject]=useState(null);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"work-section",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"section-title",children:"Portfolio"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"project-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"project-grid",children:projects.map(project=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"project-card",onMouseEnter:()=>setHoveredProject(project.id),onMouseLeave:()=>setHoveredProject(null),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"project-image",style:{backgroundImage:"url(".concat(project.image,")")},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"project-overlay ".concat(hoveredProject===project.id?'active':''),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"project-title",children:project.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"project-category",children:project.category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"project-description",children:project.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"project-links",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("a",{href:project.github,target:"_blank",rel:"noopener noreferrer",className:"project-link github-link",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FaGithub,{className:"link-icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"GitHub"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("a",{href:project.demo,target:"_blank",rel:"noopener noreferrer",className:"project-link demo-link",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MdPreview,{className:"link-icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Demo"})]})]})]})})},project.id))})})]});};export default Work;
